headline: Core architecture techniques led the month as agentic engineering harnesses became the dominant framing for AI development.
body: A broad cluster of foundational techniques moved together at the top this window, including neural operators, embeddings, text-to-image generation, layer normalization, RoPE, and image inpainting, with KV cache quantization improving on efficiency. New entrants and breakouts skewed toward architecture internals, with feed forward network, Softmax, optimal transport, and primitive-action decomposition surfacing alongside the doer-judge framework, emergent behavior, and role confusion. On the applied side, the discourse centered on harnesses over models: Latent Space framed Meta-style test harnesses as the emerging standard, and Google's agentic engineering playbook argued the model is 10 percent of success and the surrounding context, tools, and verification are 90 percent. Anthropic also accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, and Europe pushed back on US semiconductor export controls.

cited_items.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities - BBC
Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
Google Just Dropped a Masterclass on Agentic Engineering (It's SO Good)
